# Hodophile Website Instructions

- Use the Next.js App Router with TypeScript.
- Keep the site SEO-first: static routes, metadata, sitemap, robots, canonical URLs, and structured data.
- Preserve the black and #FCC000 brand palette unless the user asks for a redesign.
- Prefer server components and static rendering where possible.
- Update the sitemap and metadata whenever new public routes are added.
- Keep content focused on domestic travel in Pakistan.
